DOMComponentItem.name: Newgrounds.IO/components/Newgrounds.IO SaveSlot Manager Large
DOMComponentItem.symbolDescription: Displays SaveSlot informaton and allows the user to load and clear slots

Actionscript.script: this.msg.text = this.action === "Load Data" ? "Your game was loaded!" : "Your game was saved!";

DOMTextRun.characters: No save slot data exists for this game.

DOMComponentItem.parametersAsXML: <property id="action"> <Inspectable name="Action" variable="action" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Load Data" enumeration="Load Data,Save Data" type="List"/> </property> <property id="sort_by"> <Inspectable name="Sort By" variable="sort_by" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="Slot ID" enumeration="Slot ID,Last Updated" type="List"/> </property> <property id="show_slot_numbers"> <Inspectable name="Show Slot Numbers" variable="show_slot_numbers" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="true" type="Boolean"/> </property> <property id="use_raw"> <Inspectable name="Use Raw Data" variable="use_raw" category="" verbose="0" defaultValue="false" type="Boolean"/> </property>
